goal: Complete T0201-T0207 with fail-closed identity, endpoint, age, recovery-ceremony and immutable supply-chain boundaries before real data access.
scope: exact Gmail endpoint guard before transport
Repository-ID anchored GitHub endpoint guard and short token client
protected Recovery Key ceremony ports and one-time synthetic proof
transitive dependency hash lock, CycloneDX SBOM, Action SHA, age checksum and container digest
non_goals: real Gmail authorization or message access
real private repository discovery, write or cross-repository canary
real GitHub App or protected Environment Secret use
real Recovery Key delivery through the development thread
Processed parsers, timeline publishing, M3 or production deployment
protected_oracles: AC-012 real one-time key delivery and recovery
AC-021 remote CodeQL and dependency review execution
rollback: Revert the single local Stage 2 commit; Stage 1 remains at its pinned verified commit and no remote state has changed.
stop_conditions: frozen Stage 0 manifest or Stage 1 cumulative gates drift
real or sensitive value enters the publishable tree
a forbidden endpoint reaches a transport
a protected oracle would require credential or remote write authority
a critical or high unaccepted dependency vulnerability is observed
an immutable pin or recovery boundary cannot be verified
